title: refactor(mockups): complete redesign of 9 BISP-inspired school homepages with unified design system

areas.summary: Full redesign: new typography system (Cormorant Garamond serif + Manrope sans), restructured sections (manifeste, piliers, nombres, parcours, archive, voices, quartier, admissions), CSS token refactor with modern color palette (ink-deep #0f1e3a, gold #c9a44a).
Parallel redesign with Beau Soleil variant: navy #002654 dominant, sun yellow #ffd931 accents, flat design approach, font stack (Clash Display, EB Garamond, Switzer).

areas.path_prefix: inspired-ecoledesroches/ inspired-gordonstoun/ inspired-hautlac/ inspired-kentcollege/ inspired-lerosey/ inspired-repton/ inspired-sevenoaks/
areas.summary: Coordinated refactors across remaining 7 school properties following unified design system architecture with per-school token customization.

notable: Systematic redesign of all 9 BISP-inspired school homepages with shared design architecture (pillar sections, unified token system, modern font stacks) but customized color palettes per school—completed as coordinated batch within 13-minute window.

title: fix(inspired-beausoleil): typography normalization in age ranges and addresses

areas.summary: Replace en-dashes (—) with French typography: 'à' in age ranges (3—6 ans → 3 à 6 ans) and regular hyphens (-) in street addresses (61—63 rue → 61-63 rue). Applied across 11 instances in student profiles and campus location listings.
Updated backup log with automated push operations.

notable: Systematic typographic correction replacing all en-dashes with proper French typography conventions throughout the inspired-beausoleil school website index.

title: style(inspired): Responsive hero refactor with CSS variables and 100svh optimization across 4 school pages

areas.summary: Added CSS variables --header-h and --hero-cap-max, replaced padding-top with calc() offset, introduced 100svh with cap constraint and overflow:clip. Typography refined: reduced hero title font-size (2.6→2.2rem), adjusted line-height and margins. Consolidated HTML: hero title from 3 lines to 1. Removed campus location reference.

Integrated header height and hero cap variables, changed overflow hidden→clip, added 100svh height scaling. CTA positioning updated with clamp() for responsive offsets. Typography reduced (46px→38px title). Hero eyebrow trimmed (removed founding year). Lede simplified and shortened.

Applied CSS variables and 100svh+cap pattern, added flex centering to hero. Grid layout reduced 4→3 columns with narrower max-width. Typography adjustments (40→36px title clamp). Removed language curriculum stats section (50/50 Français Anglais). Lede substantially condensed.

Added header height variable, replaced hardcoded padding-top with variable reference, replaced height calc with clamp(). Added flex layout to hero container. Typography bumped up (22→28px title), adjusted letter-spacing. Removed campus count reference.

notable: Batch refactor of 4 Inspired school pages implementing shared CSS variable pattern for header-aware hero padding, viewport-height scaling with 100svh caps, and consistent reduction of redundant location/curriculum copy for tighter layouts.
